ageGateSubtitle: Atzengold is authentic, unfiltered lager. To enter, you must prove you are old enough to break bread and share a drink with us.
ageGateQuestion: Are you 16 years or older, brother?
ageGateError: Sorry buddy! Grab a soda for now. Come back when you turn 16!
heroSubtitle: Unfiltered, bottom-fermented Franconian Kellerbier for your closest friends. Brewed with absolute respect, shared over concrete.
storySubtitle:
The cradle of our delicious beer lies in Atzenhof, a peaceful suburb of Fürth.

Mentioned in documents as early as 1313 (estimated), the settlement at the time was awarded to Knight Rapoto of Kühlsheim and subsequently became part of the Franconian Switzerland influence area, which to this day boasts the highest density of breweries in the world.

Thus, in a traditional way, Atzengold owes its golden color and drinkable full-bodied taste to its ingredients: water, barley malt, hops, yeast.

Cheers, Atze!
brewSubtitle: Brewed in accordance with the Bavarian Purity Law using prime Franconian resources – bottled for the streets.
brewUnfilteredDesc: Naturally cloudy Kellerbier. Solid flavor, rich in natural vitamins and yeast.
brewModelDesc: We brew in cooperation, renting unused capacity from traditional German family breweries.
mapSubtitle: Find cold Atzengold! Our interactive 3D styled map displays all spots in Franconia & Berlin with real-time stock levels.
notificationToastBody: Ice cold Atzengold was just restocked at:
b2bSubtitle: Would you like to offer Atzengold at your bar, restaurant, or neighborhood late-night corner shop? Order wholesale crates & kegs directly.
b2bFormSuccess: Request submitted successfully, Atze! Gabriel will get in touch with you shortly to finalize your wholesale pricing.
shopSubtitle: Support the startup! Shipping heavy glass bottles across Germany is hard, so buy some high-quality local streetwear gear to spread the vibe.
shopCheckoutSuccess: Awesome! Your order was registered. We'll pack it with love and throw in some high-quality Atzengold coasters for free!
instagramSubtitle: Follow @atzengold on Instagram for fresh updates, pop-up events, and late-night pavement culture.
